name: Amy Wolkowinsky
school: School of Informatics, Computing, and Cyber Systems
focus: Research coordination • Interdisciplinary collaboration • Program support
bio: Amy JoAnne Wolkowinsky supports interdisciplinary work connected to the Radiant Center through roles in the School of Informatics, Computing, and Cyber Systems and the School of Earth and Sustainability. Her work contributes to research coordination, collaborative project support, and cross-disciplinary engagement across applied science and environmental research settings.
